title: Repurposed Mall Nürnberg
description: The challenge in this project was to fully refunction and reuse an empty Mall in the middle of central Nuremberg. Future uses include a food court, a university campus, a learning center, a supermarket and more. By creating a hall in the center of the building the whole wayfinding and interconnectivity of the building gets boosted - supporting the future uses.

title: Green pathway through Valencia
description: Through Human Centered Design - meaning interviews with people who move and live through the space, designing for them and iterating - this grand restructure strategy of a wooden pathway on top of the street which acts as a barrier today was formed. This could be used as a blueprint for more parts of the city in the future.

title: Pension for sports on water in Potsdam
description: On a currently empty (only used for partial parking) plot this project foresees a pension for the widely practiced sports on the lake of potsdam. Included are hotel rooms, a paddling school, community and sport rooms, a cafe and open spaces.

title: Learning Valley for the University Hamburg
description: This project was my bachelor thesis tackling a real question about how to reuse an old office high-rise complex. My approach was to combine the 3 buildings together to create a 'learning valley' inside.

title: Hotel in the Deserts of Australia
description: A visionary hotel-observatory-hybrid in the middle of the australian desert. Functioning as a wellness oasis as well as the perfect spot to watch the start since there is not a lot of light pollution around.

title: Cube Megaproject in Skopje
description: A bold project with its approach to completely revise the traffic and skyline of the City of Skopje.

title: Concert Hall Regensburg
description: A newly built concert hall on an empty plot in Regensburg to complete Regensburgs rich cultural offers. There are 2 concert halls with the upper one being the main hall, offering optimal sound support for a concert.

title: Paddling School at Lake Constance
description: Lake constance is famous for its usage of boats - obviously. The city of Überlingen needed a new harbor for sailing ships. This project approaches the lake carefully as to not disturb the nature of lake constance but rather enhance it - through being built entirely on the water swimming and reintegrating natural habitats specifically for lake constances wild life in the old harbor.

title: Bachelor Degree Architectural Models
description: A collection of arcitectural models built in my bachelors degree (2018-2021)

title: Analysing the City Shape of Barcelona
description: This project showcases a careful and thorough analysis of the origins of Barcelonas city shapes. Barcelona is very famous for its superblocks, how did they come to be and what challenges did they face?
